mnemonics: Don't Get Caught Sleeping (Distributed-memory, Coordinating the processes, Shared-memory)
Dogs Chase Snails Slowly Down Hallways (Distributed-memory, Coordinating the processes/threads, Shared-memory)
keyPoints: Distributed-memory: Separate memory for each processing unit, no shared memory.
Coordinating processes/threads: Synchronization techniques (e.g., locks, semaphores) to manage access to shared resources.
Shared-memory: All processing units share a common memory space, no need for inter-processor communication.
Distributed-memory: Suitable for large-scale parallel processing, using techniques like message passing or shared memory.
